market.summary: South Korea's tech sector shows robust growth driven by AI and semiconductor demand. Government plans to increase R&D investment by 30% in 2026.

art.summary: Art market records broken on April 2nd with Yoshitomo Nara's work selling for KRW 15 billion. Preparations for the Galleries Art Fair (April 8-12) are in full swing.

latest_briefing.summary: AI and semiconductors drive tech growth; government announces increased R&D support. Seoul art scene achieves record-breaking auction results ahead of the upcoming Galleries Art Fair.
